humanTransformInCommit.description: replaced string '-' with NO_VALUE_PLACEHOLDER identifier, kept || coalescing
humanTransformInCommit.notes: source has eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/prefer-nullish-coalescing with explicit comment 'empty string should display -' fallback'. The author intentionally kept || instead of ?? because empty strings are meaningful in this column. A pure HARDCODED_DASH fixer would replace the literal but leave the ||. The interpreter overclassifies as FALSY_COALESCE_NUMERIC, triggering review=yes, which correctly blocks auto-fix.

expectedFixerBehavior: skip (requiresManualReview=true). Source unchanged after fixer runs. This is the fixture that proves the review gate works under superficial similarity to auto-fixable kinds.
